title: rubus elumbis
intro: Rubus elumbis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus elumbis include its ability to help manage diabetes, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic medicine. Rubus elumbis can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
